message:
Command `MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"

echo "=== Restart from OpenROAD.Floorplan (step 09) to rebuild ODB without amuxbus ports ==="
echo "Start: $(date)"

cd "$MCU_DIR/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper"

# Clean up the failed step 24 dir so state is clean from step 23
rm -rf runs/wrapper_run/24-openroad-globalplacement 2>/dev/null

nohup librelane \
  --pdk-root /nc/pdk \
  --pdk sky130A \
  --run-tag wrapper_run \
  --design-dir . \
  --from OpenROAD.Floorplan \
  config.json \
  >> /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log 2>&1 &

NEW_PID=$!
echo "LibreLane PID: $NEW_PID"
sleep 8
ps -p $NEW_PID -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime 2>/dev/null && echo "Running" || echo "FAILED"
echo ""
tail -10 /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log` executed with exit code 0.

message.content: The netlist is cleanly patched — 1289 ports (1391 - 102), zero `amuxbus` ports in the module declaration, all 102 converted to internal wires. Now restart from floorplan to rebuild the ODB cleanly.

extras.command:
MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"

echo "=== Restart from OpenROAD.Floorplan (step 09) to rebuild ODB without amuxbus ports ==="
echo "Start: $(date)"

cd "$MCU_DIR/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper"

# Clean up the failed step 24 dir so state is clean from step 23
rm -rf runs/wrapper_run/24-openroad-globalplacement 2>/dev/null

nohup librelane \
  --pdk-root /nc/pdk \
  --pdk sky130A \
  --run-tag wrapper_run \
  --design-dir . \
  --from OpenROAD.Floorplan \
  config.json \
  >> /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log 2>&1 &

NEW_PID=$!
echo "LibreLane PID: $NEW_PID"
sleep 8
ps -p $NEW_PID -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime 2>/dev/null && echo "Running" || echo "FAILED"
